scored_papers.title: Dual wavelength source of entanglement for space quantum communication
scored_papers.abstract: SPDC in PPLN crystal embedded in polarization Sagnac interferometer. Polarization + time-energy entangled pairs at 810 + 1550 nm. Brightness 4800 pair/s/mW/GHz, two-photon interference visibilities 0.995 (pol) and 0.991 (energy-time).
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 SPDC + Sagnac で polarization + time-energy エンタングル光子対、 二光子干渉 visibility 0.99+ ✨ wave-packet × 二光子干渉のど真ん中 🛰️
scored_papers.summary: 🔬 PPLN + Sagnac で位相安定 SPDC、 hybrid 量子通信 (free-space 810nm + fiber 1550nm)。 visibility 0.995/0.991 で Bell 違反十分 💎

scored_papers.title: Mid-infrared temporal ghost imaging via two-photon structured encoding
scored_papers.abstract: Broadband MIR TGI via non-degenerate two-photon absorption at silicon detector. Reconstructed waveforms exceed detector bandwidth 40x, 0.05 pJ/pulse sensitivity, compressed sensing 80% fewer measurements, 2.5-3.8 micron.
scored_papers.reason: 🌈 二光子吸収 MIR temporal ghost imaging、 NIR pump で MIR signal を Si 検出器上で直接 modulate ✨ ghost imaging × two-photon の最新例
scored_papers.summary: ⏱️ 非縮退二光子吸収で MIR TGI、 Si 検出器 BW を 40 倍超え。 圧縮センシングで 80% 計測削減、 2.5-3.8μm broadband 🔍
